brand.name: Vrax Voyage
brand.tone: Luxurious, cinematic, exclusive but accessible (premium deals)
brand.target_audience: Francophone travelers seeking premium flight comparison, VIP transfers, and high-end sunny destinations.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing. Allow components to breathe, use massive paddings on sections (py-24 to py-32).
layout_and_spacing.grid: Bento Grid Protocol. Asymmetric and elegant card placements.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.header: Crystal Glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0a0f1a]/60 border-b border-white/10.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.cards: Neumorphism mix: Solid surface #121826 with 1px border-white/5, subtle inner shadows, and hover border-color shift to gold (border-[#c9a84c]/50).
surfaces_and_micro_themes.widgets: Widgets (TravelPayouts/KiwiTaxi) must be housed in elegant frames with subtle glowing borders to integrate seamlessly.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1) and cast a soft gold ambient shadow (shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(201,168,76,0.15)]).
motion_and_interactions.buttons: Primary buttons: Gold background, inverse text (black), slow scaling on hover (scale-105).
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Smooth fade-ins and staggered list animations.

hero_bg.description: Luxury airplane window view at sunset. To be used with heavy #0a0f1a gradient overlay.

blog_destination_maldives.description: Sunny Maldives destination for the blog/destinations section.

vip_transfers.description: Luxury black chauffeur car for KiwiTaxi section.

icons.style: Thin, stroke-width 1.5, colored in gold (#c9a84c) for accents.

components_instructions.general: Use HTML/Tailwind for layouts. Use customized Shadcn for interactives (Forms, Dropdowns). Include data-testid attributes on all interactive elements.
components_instructions.affiliate_widgets: Render TravelPayouts (marker=704469), KiwiTaxi, and Amazon (tag=vrax-21) iframes/scripts safely using React's dangerouslySetInnerHTML inside dark styled container divs.
components_instructions.blog_system: Build a static or mocked content grid for sunny destinations with elegant cards, implementing a custom likes/comments UI layout.
components_instructions.legal_pages: Mentions légales, CGU, Privacy Policy, and Disclosure Affiliation should be clean typographic pages using the Outfit font, with standard reading widths (max-w-3xl).

tech_stack.frontend: React (JS), Tailwind CSS, Shadcn/UI primitives, Framer Motion (for transitions)
